game_name: Super Fire Pro Wrestling X Premium

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Timing-based button press system forms foundation for all combat
1v1 opponent scenarios establish core wrestling rhythm
Introduces partner coordination and tag-in timing
Hardcore variants (Landmine Death Match, Electric Barbed Wire Cage) introduce environmental hazards
Multiple wrestling styles (WWE, lucha-libre, puroresu, joshi, hardcore) require adaptive strategy
Deep customization of appearance, movesets, and AI behavior extends gameplay depth

typical_tension_triggers: Opponent building momentum with combo moves
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based rhythm with escalating intensity through timed grappling windows; tension builds through opponent momentum, relief comes from successful defensive/offensive timing execution

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory matches use basic grappling mechanics and straightforward opponents; emphasis on learning timing system
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tag team variants and increased opponent AI complexity; introduction to specialized wrestling styles requiring strategy adaptation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Hardcore match types with environmental hazards; wrestlers representing diverse combat sports styles; high-level CPU AI behavior
notable_spikes: Transition to hardcore match types with environmental damage
Opponents using specialized wrestling styles unfamiliar to player

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear increase in opponent difficulty through 1v1 match scenarios; teaches core timing-based grappling mechanics
Progression from conventional singles/tag matches to extreme variants (Landmine Death Match, Electric Barbed Wire Cage); introduces environmental interaction
Opponent variety spanning WWE sports-entertainment, Mexican lucha-libre, Japanese puroresu, joshi wrestling, and hardcore styles; requires tactical adaptation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Career progression featuring global wrestler roster

notable_level_patterns.description: Tag matches require partner management, tag-in timing, and position awareness; increases complexity beyond single-player mechanics

sources_used: wikipedia - Fire Pro Wrestling series overview
extraction_notes: Source material focused on series features and game design rather than specific level sequencing for X Premium. Element introduction order and rhythm patterns inferred from documented grappling system focus and match variety structure. Spatial grammar patterns typical of 2D sprite-based wrestling games (horizontal arena, no backtracking). Difficulty curve constructed from match type progression and wrestler style variety documentation.
